files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections merged together: a genealogy lesson on individual records, an art/architecture lesson on winter landscapes, a home economics lesson on LDS homes, and an article about the International Congress of Genealogy. The file also includes various outlines for 1916 lessons and advertisements at the end.
